# `mise bootstrap shell`

- **Usage**: `mise bootstrap shell <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage mise shell activation from `[bootstrap.mise_shell_activate]`

## Subcommands

- [`mise bootstrap shell apply [-n --dry-run] [-y --yes]`](/cli/bootstrap/shell/apply.md)
- [`mise bootstrap shell status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/bootstrap/shell/status.md)
